message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): cx-first web handlers + SSE delta stream (tick 257)

Migrates 4 ambient storage calls across 2 web-layer modules in
`frankenterm-core/web/` to their `_with_cx` siblings.

**`web/handlers.rs` (3 sites):**

- `get_events` handler L207 + loop-L212: `storage.get_events(query)` →
  `get_events_with_cx(&events_cx, query)` plus
  `storage.get_event_annotations(event.id)` →
  `get_event_annotations_with_cx(&events_cx, event.id)` with a shared
  loop-hoisted `events_cx` binding (avoids re-resolving `Cx::current()`
  per annotation lookup).
- `search` handler L311: `storage.search_with_results(&query, options)`
  → `search_with_results_with_cx(&search_cx, &query, options)`.

**`web/sse.rs` (1 site):**

- SSE delta stream L312: `storage.scan_segments(query)` →
  `scan_segments_with_cx(&scan_cx, query)`. This is the hot path for
  real-time pane delta streaming in the web UI — a subscription cancel
  now cleanly aborts the underlying segment scan.

All four sites resolve cx via `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)`
inside the web handler's `async move` / `Box::pin(async move {...})`
body. Web-layer handlers don't thread Cx through their trait dispatch
signatures — call-time resolution picks up whatever Cx is active on
the HTTP/SSE runtime's handler task worker.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean.

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 71 (187-257).
frankenterm-core internal sites: 21 (runtime 7 + mcp 2 + tui 8 + web 4).
main.rs cross-crate total: 127 sites (unchanged this tick).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
